---
title: "Diagrammes de Minkowski"
execute:
  enabled: false
format:
  html:
    highlight-style: github

---

## Simulation

```{=html}
<div id="glowscript" class="glowscript">
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8">
<link type="text/css" href="https://www.glowscript.org/css/redmond/2.1/jquery-ui.custom.css" rel="stylesheet" />
<link type="text/css" href="https://www.glowscript.org/css/ide.css" rel="stylesheet" />
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/lib/jquery/2.1/jquery.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/lib/jquery/2.1/jquery-ui.custom.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/package/glow.3.2.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="https://www.glowscript.org/package/RSrun.3.2.min.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript"><!--//--><![CDATA[//><!--

// START JAVASCRIPT
;(function() {;
var ρσ_modules = {};
var acheck, rcheck, bcheck, cMagenta, sObjet, txtVitesseObjet, x_label, xInput, ct_label, ctInput, x2_label, ct2_label, x2Input, ct2Input, tempTag, ajoutBouton, bouton_supprimer, modeEntree, boutonSegment, objVitesse, tempVitesse, tempGamma, pointeurSouris, vslider, min_x, max_x, hauteur, écart, profondeur, counter, modeAjout, debutLigne, clicEnCours;
ρσ_modules.pythonize = {};

(function(){
    function strings() {
        var string_funcs, exclude, name;
        string_funcs = set("capitalize strip lstrip rstrip islower isupper isspace lower upper swapcase center count endswith startswith find rfind index rindex format join ljust rjust partition rpartition replace split rsplit splitlines zfill".split(" "));
        if (!arguments.length) {
            exclude = (function(){
                var s = ρσ_set();
                s.jsset.add("split");
                s.jsset.add("replace");
                return s;
            })();
        } else if (arguments[0]) {
            exclude = Array.prototype.slice.call(arguments);
        } else {
            exclude = null;
        }
        if (exclude) {
            string_funcs = string_funcs.difference(set(exclude));
        }
        var ρσ_Iter0 = string_funcs;
        ρσ_Iter0 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter0[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter0 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter0.keys() : ρσ_Iter0) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter0));
        for (var ρσ_Index0 of ρσ_Iter0) {
            name = ρσ_Index0;
            (ρσ_expr_temp = String.prototype)[(typeof name === "number" && name < 0) ? ρσ_expr_temp.length + name : name] = (ρσ_expr_temp = ρσ_str.prototype)[(typeof name === "number" && name < 0) ? ρσ_expr_temp.length + name : name];
        }
    };
    if (!strings.__module__) Object.defineProperties(strings, {
        __module__ : {value: "pythonize"}
    });

    ρσ_modules.pythonize.strings = strings;
})();
async function __main__() {
"use strict";
    var display = canvas;
    var scene = canvas();

    function round(num, n=0) {return Number(num.toFixed(n))}

    function input(arg) {
    	arg = arg || {}
    	if (arg.prompt !== undefined && arg.prompt != '') return prompt(arg.prompt)
    	else if (typeof arg === 'string') return prompt(arg)
    	else return prompt()
    }

    var version, print, arange, __name__, type, ρσ_ls, counter, tempVitesse, tempGamma, objVitesse, min_x, max_x, hauteur, profondeur, écart, modeAjout, debutLigne, clicEnCours, pointeurSouris, tempDel, tempDelBase, objetsMagenta, obj, tempTitre, p_label, pInput, min_label, minInput, tempTag, h_label, hInput, max_label, maxInput, e_label, eInput, v_label, sVitesse, txtVitesse, start_button, fleche_x, fleche_y, fleche_xobv, fleche_yobv;
    version = ρσ_list_decorate([ "3.2", "glowscript" ]);
    Array.prototype['+'] = function(r) {return this.concat(r)}
    Array.prototype['*'] = function(r) {return __array_times_number(this, r)}
    window.__GSlang = "vpython";
    print = GSprint;
    arange = range;
    __name__ = "__main__";
    type = pytype;
    var strings = ρσ_modules.pythonize.strings;

    strings();
    "13";
    counter = 0;
    "14";
    tempVitesse = .6;
    "15";
    tempGamma = 1["/"](sqrt(1["-"](1["*"](Math.pow(tempVitesse, 2)))));
    "16";
    objVitesse = .6;
    "17";
    min_x = 0;
    "18";
    max_x = 0;
    "19";
    hauteur = 0;
    "20";
    profondeur = 0;
    "21";
    écart = 0;
    "22";
    modeAjout = true;
    "24";
    debutLigne = null;
    "25";
    clicEnCours = false;
    "27";
    scene.visible = false;
    "29";
    scene.background = color.black;
    "30";
    scene.align = "left";
    "31";
    pointeurSouris = null;
    "33";
    tempDel = ρσ_list_decorate([]);
    "34";
    tempDelBase = ρσ_list_decorate([]);
    "35";
    objetsMagenta = ρσ_list_decorate([]);
    "37";
    var ρσ_Iter1 = scene.objects;
    ρσ_Iter1 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter1[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter1 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter1.keys() : ρσ_Iter1) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter1));
    for (var ρσ_Index1 of ρσ_Iter1) {
        obj = ρσ_Index1;
        "38";
        if ((await hasattr(obj, "shininess"))) {
            "39";
            obj.shininess = 0;
        }
    }
    "42";
    scene.caption = "";
    "45";
    tempTitre = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>Paramètres<\/b><br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "49";
    p_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " ct (min):  ", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "50";
    pInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, text: "0", type: "numeric", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "53";
    min_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " x (min):  ", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "54";
    minInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, text: "0", type: "numeric", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "57";
    tempTag = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b></b><br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "59";
    h_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " ct (max): ", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "60";
    hInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, text: "10", type: "numeric", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "63";
    max_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " x (max): ", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "64";
    maxInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, text: "10", type: "numeric", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "67";
    e_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " Pas de graduation: ", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    (await sleep(.1));
    "68";
    eInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, text: "1", type: "numeric", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "70";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br><br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "74";
    tempTag = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b></b><br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "76";
    v_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "Vitesse de l'observateur : ", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "77";
    sVitesse = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, slider, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({min: 1["-u"]()["*"](.99), max: .99, value: .6, step: .01, length: 200, bind: majVitesseSlider, pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "78";
    txtVitesse = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " (v = 0.6 c)", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "80";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br><br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "82";
    start_button = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, button, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: lancer_diagramme, text: "Créer le diagramme", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "83";
    ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br><br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    "87";
    async function br() {
        "88";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
    };
    if (!br.__module__) Object.defineProperties(br, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "89";
    async function creer_ui_secondaire() {
        "90";
        "91";
        "92";
        "93";
        "94";
        "97";
        tempTag.text = "<b>Vitesse de l'observateur</b><br>";
        "99";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>Affichages</b>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "100";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "105";
        rcheck = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, checkbox, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: cacherRef, text: "Afficher le référentiel en mouvement", checked: true, pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "106";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "108";
        bcheck = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, checkbox, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: cacherRefBase, text: "Afficher le référentiel stationnaire", checked: true, pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "109";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "111";
        cMagenta = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, checkbox, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: retirerObjet, text: "Afficher les objets", checked: true, pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "112";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "113";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.title_anchor})]);
        "115";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>  Vitesse de l'objet</b>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "116";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "119";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "121";
        sObjet = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, slider, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({min: 1["-u"]()["*"](1), max: 1, value: .6, length: 200, bind: majObjVitesse, pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "122";
        txtVitesseObjet = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: " (v = 0.6 c)", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "123";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "124";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "126";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "127";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>  Ajouter un objet par coordonnées</b>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "128";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "130";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>  ", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "131";
        modeEntree = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, checkbox, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: changer_mode_entree, text: "Coordonnées dans le référentiel en mouvement (ct', x')", checked: false, pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "135";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "136";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "138";
        ct_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "   ct :   ", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        (await sleep(.1));
        "139";
        ctInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, type: "numeric", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "140";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "142";
        x_label = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "   x :    ", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        (await sleep(.1));
        "143";
        xInput = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, winput, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({bind: test, type: "numeric", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "144";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "145";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "157";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>  ", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "158";
        ajoutBouton = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, button, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "Ajouter l'objet", bind: ajouter_point_manuellement, pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "160";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "161";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "169";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<b>  ", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "170";
        bouton_supprimer = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, button, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "Supprimer le dernier objet", bind: supprimer_dernier_objet, pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "171";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
        "172";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, wtext, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({text: "<br>", pos: scene.caption_anchor})]);
    };
    if (!creer_ui_secondaire.__module__) Object.defineProperties(creer_ui_secondaire, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "176";
    async function supprimer_dernier_objet(b) {
        "177";
        if (len(objetsMagenta)[">="](2)) {
            "178";
            ρσ_getitem(objetsMagenta, 1["-u"]()["*"](1)).visible = false;
            "179";
            ρσ_getitem(objetsMagenta, 1["-u"]()["*"](2)).visible = false;
            "180";
            objetsMagenta.pypop();
            "181";
            objetsMagenta.pypop();
        }
    };
    if (!supprimer_dernier_objet.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(supprimer_dernier_objet, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["b"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "183";
    async function changer_mode_entree(ev) {
        "184";
        "185";
        if (ev.checked) {
            "186";
            x_label.text = "   x' :    ";
            "187";
            ct_label.text = "   ct' :   ";
            "188";
            x2_label.text = " x2' :  ";
            "189";
            ct2_label.text = " ct2' : ";
            "190";
        } else {
            "191";
            x_label.text = "   x :    ";
            "192";
            ct_label.text = "   ct :   ";
            "193";
            x2_label.text = " x2 :  ";
            "194";
            ct2_label.text = " ct2 : ";
        }
    };
    if (!changer_mode_entree.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(changer_mode_entree, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "196";
    async function ajouter_segment_manuellementt(b) {
        var ρσ_ls, x1, ct1, x2, ct2, p1, p2;
        "197";
        "199";
        try {
            "201";
            x1 = float(xInput.text);
            "202";
            ct1 = float(ctInput.text);
            "203";
            x2 = float(x2Input.text);
            "204";
            ct2 = float(ct2Input.text);
            "205";
        } catch (ρσ_Exception) {
            ρσ_last_exception = ρσ_Exception;
            if (ρσ_Exception instanceof ValueError) {
                "206";
                print("Entrées invalides.");
                "207";
                return;
            } else {
                throw ρσ_Exception;
            }
        }
        "209";
        p1 = (await coord_vers_vec(x1, ct1));
        "210";
        p2 = (await coord_vers_vec(x2, ct2));
    };
    if (!ajouter_segment_manuellementt.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(ajouter_segment_manuellementt, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["b"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "212";
    async function ajouter_segment_manuellement(b) {
        var ρσ_ls, x1, ct1, x2, ct2, p1, p2, seg, n, direction, t, point, cyl, i, ligne;
        "213";
        try {
            "214";
            x1 = float(xInput.text);
            "215";
            ct1 = float(ctInput.text);
            "216";
            x2 = float(x2Input.text);
            "217";
            ct2 = float(ct2Input.text);
            "218";
        } catch (ρσ_Exception) {
            ρσ_last_exception = ρσ_Exception;
            {
                "219";
                print("Entrées invalides.");
                "220";
                return;
            } 
        }
        "222";
        p1 = (await coord_vers_vec(x1, ct1));
        "223";
        p2 = (await coord_vers_vec(x2, ct2));
        "226";
        seg = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, curve, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: ρσ_list_decorate([ p1, p2 ]), radius: .06, color: color.magenta})]);
        "227";
        objetsMagenta.append(seg);
        "230";
        n = 5;
        "231";
        direction = norm(vec(objVitesse, 1, 0));
        "232";
        for (var ρσ_Index2 = 0; ρσ_Index2["<"](n["+"](1)); ρσ_Index2++) {
            i = ρσ_Index2;
            "233";
            t = i["/"](n);
            "234";
            point = p1["*"](1["-"](1["*"](t)))["+"](p2["*"](t));
            "235";
            cyl = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: point, axis: direction["*"](20), radius: .8, color: color.magenta, opacity: .15})]);
            "236";
            objetsMagenta.append(cyl);
        }
        "240";
        ligne = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, curve, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({radius: .05, color: color.magenta})]);
        "241";
        objetsMagenta.append(ligne);
        "243";
        n = 5;
        "244";
        for (var ρσ_Index3 = 0; ρσ_Index3["<"](n["+"](1)); ρσ_Index3++) {
            i = ρσ_Index3;
            "245";
            t = i["/"](n);
            "246";
            point = p1["*"](1["-"](1["*"](t)))["+"](p2["*"](t));
            "247";
            ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(ligne, ligne.append, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: point})]);
            "249";
            direction = norm(vec(objVitesse, 1, 0));
            "250";
            cyl = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: point, axis: direction["*"](20), radius: 1, color: color.magenta, opacity: .1})]);
            "252";
            objetsMagenta.append(cyl);
        }
    };
    if (!ajouter_segment_manuellement.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(ajouter_segment_manuellement, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["b"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "254";
    async function coord_vers_vec(x, ct) {
        var ρσ_ls, tempL, u_xp, u_ctp;
        "257";
        if (modeEntree.checked) {
            "258";
            tempL = sqrt(Math.pow(x, 2)["+"](Math.pow(ct, 2)));
            "261";
            u_xp = tempGamma["*"](norm(vec(1["/"](tempVitesse), 1, 0)));
            "262";
            u_ctp = tempGamma["*"](norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0)));
            "265";
            return x["*"](u_xp)["+"](ct["*"](u_ctp));
            "267";
        } else {
            "268";
            return vec(x, ct, 0);
        }
    };
    if (!coord_vers_vec.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(coord_vers_vec, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["x", "ct"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "271";
    async function ajouter_point_manuellement(b) {
        var ρσ_ls, x, ct, pasprimex, pasprimect, position, sph, direction, cyl;
        "272";
        try {
            "273";
            x = float(xInput.text);
            "274";
            ct = float(ctInput.text);
            "277";
            if (modeEntree.checked) {
                "280";
                pasprimex = tempGamma["*"](x["+"](tempVitesse["*"](ct)));
                "281";
                pasprimect = tempGamma["*"](ct["+"](tempVitesse["*"](x)));
                "293";
                position = vec(pasprimex, pasprimect, 0);
                "295";
            } else {
                "296";
                position = vec(x, ct, 0);
            }
            "298";
            sph = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, sphere, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: position, radius: .3, color: color.magenta})]);
            "299";
            objetsMagenta.append(sph);
            "301";
            direction = norm(vec(objVitesse, 1, 0));
            "302";
            cyl = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: position, axis: direction["*"](max_x)["*"](1.5), color: color.red, radius: .07})]);
            "303";
            objetsMagenta.append(cyl);
            "304";
        } catch (ρσ_Exception) {
            ρσ_last_exception = ρσ_Exception;
            if (ρσ_Exception instanceof ValueError) {
                "305";
                print("Entrées invalides.");
            } else {
                throw ρσ_Exception;
            }
        }
    };
    if (!ajouter_point_manuellement.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(ajouter_point_manuellement, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["b"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "310";
    async function retirerObjet(ev) {
        var ρσ_ls, o;
        "311";
        if (ev.checked) {
            "312";
            var ρσ_Iter4 = objetsMagenta;
            ρσ_Iter4 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter4[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter4 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter4.keys() : ρσ_Iter4) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter4));
            for (var ρσ_Index4 of ρσ_Iter4) {
                o = ρσ_Index4;
                "313";
                o.visible = true;
                "314";
            }
        } else {
            "315";
            var ρσ_Iter5 = objetsMagenta;
            ρσ_Iter5 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter5[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter5 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter5.keys() : ρσ_Iter5) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter5));
            for (var ρσ_Index5 of ρσ_Iter5) {
                o = ρσ_Index5;
                "316";
                o.visible = false;
            }
        }
    };
    if (!retirerObjet.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(retirerObjet, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "318";
    async function cacherRef(ev) {
        var ρσ_ls, elem;
        "319";
        if ((ev.checked === false || typeof ev.checked === "object" && ρσ_equals(ev.checked, false))) {
            "320";
            var ρσ_Iter6 = tempDel;
            ρσ_Iter6 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter6[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter6 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter6.keys() : ρσ_Iter6) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter6));
            for (var ρσ_Index6 of ρσ_Iter6) {
                elem = ρσ_Index6;
                "321";
                elem.visible = false;
                "322";
            }
        } else {
            "323";
            (await dessiner_obv(min_x, max_x, profondeur, hauteur, écart));
        }
    };
    if (!cacherRef.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(cacherRef, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "325";
    async function cacherRefBase(ev) {
        var ρσ_ls, elem;
        "326";
        if ((ev.checked === false || typeof ev.checked === "object" && ρσ_equals(ev.checked, false))) {
            "327";
            var ρσ_Iter7 = tempDelBase;
            ρσ_Iter7 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter7[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter7 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter7.keys() : ρσ_Iter7) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter7));
            for (var ρσ_Index7 of ρσ_Iter7) {
                elem = ρσ_Index7;
                "328";
                elem.visible = false;
                "329";
            }
        } else {
            "330";
            (await dessiner_plan_cartesien(min_x, max_x, hauteur, écart));
        }
    };
    if (!cacherRefBase.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(cacherRefBase, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "333";
    async function majObjVitesse() {
        "334";
        "335";
        objVitesse = sObjet.value;
        "336";
        txtVitesseObjet.text = " (v = "["+"](str(round(objVitesse, 2)))["+"](" c)");
    };
    if (!majObjVitesse.__module__) Object.defineProperties(majObjVitesse, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "338";
    async function majVitesseSlider() {
        var ρσ_ls, elem;
        "339";
        "340";
        "341";
        tempVitesse = sVitesse.value;
        "342";
        tempGamma = 1["/"](sqrt(1["-"](1["*"](Math.pow(tempVitesse, 2)))));
        "343";
        txtVitesse.text = " (v = "["+"](str(round(tempVitesse, 3)))["+"](" c)");
        "345";
        var ρσ_Iter8 = tempDel;
        ρσ_Iter8 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter8[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter8 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter8.keys() : ρσ_Iter8) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter8));
        for (var ρσ_Index8 of ρσ_Iter8) {
            elem = ρσ_Index8;
            "346";
            elem.visible = false;
        }
        "347";
        (await dessiner_obv(min_x, max_x, profondeur, hauteur, écart));
    };
    if (!majVitesseSlider.__module__) Object.defineProperties(majVitesseSlider, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "349";
    async function majVitesse(ev) {
        var ρσ_ls, elem;
        "350";
        "351";
        "352";
        tempVitesse = float(vInput.text);
        "353";
        tempGamma = 1["/"](sqrt(1["-"](1["*"](Math.pow(tempVitesse, 2)))));
        "354";
        var ρσ_Iter9 = tempDel;
        ρσ_Iter9 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter9[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter9 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter9.keys() : ρσ_Iter9) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter9));
        for (var ρσ_Index9 of ρσ_Iter9) {
            elem = ρσ_Index9;
            "355";
            elem.visible = false;
        }
        "357";
        (await dessiner_obv(min_x, max_x, profondeur, hauteur, écart));
    };
    if (!majVitesse.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(majVitesse, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "359";
    async function decomposer_position(evt) {
        var ρσ_ls, position, temp;
        "360";
        "362";
        position = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(scene.mouse, scene.mouse.project, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({normal: vec(0, 0, 1), point: vec(0, 0, 0)})]);
        "363";
        if (position === null) {
            "364";
            return;
        }
        "366";
        position.z = .2;
        "367";
        pointeurSouris.pos = position;
        "368";
        pointeurSouris.visible = true;
        "371";
        fleche_x.pos = vec(0, 0, 0);
        "372";
        fleche_x.axis = vec(position.x, 0, 0);
        "375";
        fleche_y.pos = vec(0, 0, 0);
        "376";
        fleche_y.axis = vec(0, position.y, 0);
        "378";
        temp = position.y["-"](1["*"](position.x)["*"](tempVitesse))["/"](1["/"](tempVitesse)["-"](1["*"](tempVitesse)));
        "379";
        fleche_yobv.pos = vec(0, 0, 0);
        "380";
        fleche_yobv.axis = vec(temp, temp["*"](1)["/"](tempVitesse), 0);
        "384";
        temp = position.y["-"](1["*"](position.x)["*"](1)["/"](tempVitesse))["/"](tempVitesse["-"](1["/"](tempVitesse)));
        "385";
        fleche_xobv.pos = vec(0, 0, 0);
        "386";
        fleche_xobv.axis = vec(temp, temp["*"](tempVitesse), 0);
    };
    if (!decomposer_position.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(decomposer_position, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["evt"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "392";
    async function test() {
        "393";
    };
    if (!test.__module__) Object.defineProperties(test, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "395";
    async function dessiner_plan_cartesien(min_x, max_x, hauteur, écart) {
        var ρσ_ls, x, t, y;
        "396";
        scene.center = vec(min_x["+"](max_x)["/"](2), hauteur["+"](profondeur)["/"](2), 0);
        "399";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: vec(min_x, 0, 0), shaftwidth: .08, color: color.white})]);
        "400";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: vec(max_x, 0, 0), shaftwidth: .08, color: color.white})]);
        "401";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: vec(0, hauteur, 0), shaftwidth: .08, color: color.white})]);
        "403";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, label, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(max_x, 0, 0), text: "x", xoffset: 10, height: 12, box: false, color: color.white})]);
        "404";
        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, label, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, hauteur, 0), text: "ct", yoffset: 10, height: 12, box: false, color: color.white})]);
        "408";
        x = 0;
        "409";
        while (x["<="](max_x)) {
            "410";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(x, 0, 0), axis: vec(0, hauteur["-"](1["*"](0)), 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
            "411";
            tempDelBase.append(t);
            "412";
            if (profondeur["<"](0)) {
                "413";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(x, 0, 0), axis: vec(0, 1["-u"]()["*"](hauteur), 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
                "414";
                tempDelBase.append(t);
            }
            "417";
            x=x["+"](écart);
        }
        "418";
        x = 1["-u"]()["*"](écart);
        "419";
        while (x[">="](min_x)) {
            "420";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(x, 0, 0), axis: vec(0, hauteur["-"](1["*"](0)), 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
            "421";
            tempDelBase.append(t);
            "422";
            if (profondeur["<"](0)) {
                "423";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(x, 0, 0), axis: vec(0, 1["-u"]()["*"](hauteur), 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
                "424";
                tempDelBase.append(t);
                "425";
                x=x["-"](écart);
            }
        }
        "427";
        y = 0;
        "429";
        while (y["<="](hauteur)) {
            "430";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, y, 0), axis: vec(max_x["-"](1["*"](0)), 0, 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
            "431";
            tempDelBase.append(t);
            "432";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, y, 0), axis: vec(min_x["+"](0), 0, 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
            "433";
            tempDelBase.append(t);
            "435";
            y=y["+"](écart);
            "437";
        }
        if (profondeur["<"](0)) {
            "438";
            y = 1["-u"]()["*"](écart);
            "439";
            while (y[">="](profondeur["-"](1["*"](0)))) {
                "440";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, y, 0), axis: vec(max_x["-"](1["*"](0)), 0, 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
                "441";
                tempDelBase.append(t);
                "442";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, y, 0), axis: vec(min_x["+"](0), 0, 0), radius: .05, color: color.gray(.8)})]);
                "443";
                tempDelBase.append(t);
                "445";
                y=y["-"](écart);
            }
        }
    };
    if (!dessiner_plan_cartesien.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(dessiner_plan_cartesien, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["min_x", "max_x", "hauteur", "écart"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "447";
    async function getAngle(vit) {
        "448";
        if (vit[">"](0)) {
            "449";
            return pi["/"](2)["-"](1["*"](atan(vit)));
            "450";
        } else {
            "451";
            return 1["-u"]()["*"](pi["/"](2)["-"](1["*"](atan(vit))));
        }
    };
    if (!getAngle.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(getAngle, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["vit"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "453";
    async function dessiner_obv(min_x, max_x, profondeur, hauteur, écart) {
        var ρσ_ls, t, x, y;
        "454";
        scene.center = vec(min_x["+"](max_x)["/"](2), hauteur["/"](2), 2);
        "458";
        t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: norm(vec(1["/"](tempVitesse), 1, 0))["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](cos(pi["/"](2)["-"](1["*"]((await getAngle(tempVitesse)))))), shaftwidth: .1, color: color.orange})]);
        "459";
        tempDel.append(t);
        "461";
        t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](abs(cos((await getAngle(1["/"](tempVitesse)))))), shaftwidth: .1, color: color.orange})]);
        "462";
        tempDel.append(t);
        "466";
        if (profondeur["<"](0)) {
            "467";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: norm(vec(1["-u"]()["*"](1["/"](tempVitesse)), 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0))["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](cos(pi["/"](2)["-"](1["*"]((await getAngle(tempVitesse)))))), shaftwidth: .1, color: color.orange})]);
            "468";
            tempDel.append(t);
            "469";
            if (tempVitesse["<"](0)) {
                "470";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: norm(vec(1["-u"]()["*"](tempVitesse), 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](cos((await getAngle(1["-u"]()["*"](1)["/"](tempVitesse))))), shaftwidth: .1, color: color.orange})]);
                "471";
            } else {
                "472";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), axis: norm(vec(1["-u"]()["*"](tempVitesse), 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](cos((await getAngle(1["/"](tempVitesse))))), shaftwidth: .1, color: color.orange})]);
            }
            "473";
            tempDel.append(t);
        }
        "475";
        t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, label, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: norm(vec(1["/"](tempVitesse), 1, 0))["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](cos(pi["/"](2)["-"](1["*"]((await getAngle(tempVitesse)))))), text: "x'", xoffset: 10, height: 12, box: false, color: color.orange})]);
        "476";
        tempDel.append(t);
        "479";
        if (tempVitesse[">"](0)) {
            "480";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, label, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](cos((await getAngle(1["/"](tempVitesse))))), text: "ct'", yoffset: 10, height: 12, box: false, color: color.orange})]);
            "481";
            tempDel.append(t);
            "483";
        } else {
            "484";
            t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, label, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma)["/"](abs(cos((await getAngle(1["/"](tempVitesse)))))), text: "ct'", yoffset: 10, height: 12, box: false, color: color.orange})]);
            "485";
            tempDel.append(t);
        }
        "489";
        x = 0;
        "490";
        while (x["<"](max_x["*"](tempGamma)["-"](1["*"](1))) && x["*"](tempVitesse)["<"](max_x["*"](tempGamma)["/"](2))) {
            "492";
            if (tempVitesse["<"](0)) {
                "493";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(x, x["*"](tempVitesse), 0), axis: norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
                "494";
            } else {
                "495";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(x, x["*"](tempVitesse), 0), axis: norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
            }
            "496";
            tempDel.append(t);
            "497";
            if (profondeur["<"](0)) {
                "499";
                if (tempVitesse["<"](0)) {
                    "500";
                    t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(1["-u"]()["*"](x), 1["-u"]()["*"](x)["*"](tempVitesse), 0), axis: norm(vec(tempVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](1["-u"]())["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
                    "501";
                } else {
                    "502";
                    t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(1["-u"]()["*"](x), 1["-u"]()["*"](x)["*"](tempVitesse), 0), axis: norm(vec(1["-u"]()["*"](tempVitesse), 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0))["*"](hauteur)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
                }
                "503";
                tempDel.append(t);
            }
            "504";
            x=x["+"](écart["*"](tempGamma));
        }
        "505";
        x = 1["-u"]()["*"](écart)["*"](tempGamma);
        "510";
        y = 0;
        "512";
        while (y["<="](hauteur["*"](tempGamma)["-"](1["*"](1))) && y["*"](tempVitesse)["<"](hauteur["*"](tempGamma)["/"](2))) {
            "513";
            if (tempVitesse["<"](0)) {
                "514";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(y["*"](tempVitesse), y, 0), axis: norm(vec(1["-u"]()["*"](1["/"](tempVitesse)), 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0))["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
                "515";
            } else {
                "516";
                t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(y["*"](tempVitesse), y, 0), axis: norm(vec(1["/"](tempVitesse), 1, 0))["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
            }
            "517";
            tempDel.append(t);
            "518";
            if (profondeur["<"](0)) {
                "519";
                if (tempVitesse["<"](0)) {
                    "520";
                    t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(1["-u"]()["*"](y)["*"](tempVitesse), 1["-u"]()["*"](y), 0), axis: norm(vec(1["-u"]()["*"](1["/"](tempVitesse)), 1["-u"]()["*"](1), 0))["*"](1["-u"]())["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
                    "521";
                } else {
                    "522";
                    t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(1["-u"]()["*"](y)["*"](tempVitesse), 1["-u"]()["*"](y), 0), axis: norm(vec(1["/"](tempVitesse), 1, 0))["*"](1["-u"]())["*"](max_x)["*"](tempGamma), radius: .05, color: color.orange})]);
                }
                "523";
                tempDel.append(t);
            }
            "524";
            y=y["+"](écart["*"](tempGamma));
        }
    };
    if (!dessiner_obv.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(dessiner_obv, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["min_x", "max_x", "profondeur", "hauteur", "écart"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "529";
    async function lancer_diagramme(bouton) {
        var ρσ_ls, w;
        "530";
        "531";
        min_x = int(minInput.text);
        "532";
        max_x = int(maxInput.text);
        "533";
        hauteur = int(hInput.text);
        "534";
        profondeur = int(pInput.text);
        "535";
        écart = float(eInput.text);
        "537";
        (await dessiner_plan_cartesien(min_x, max_x, hauteur, écart));
        "538";
        (await dessiner_obv(min_x, max_x, profondeur, hauteur, écart));
        "541";
        var ρσ_Iter10 = ρσ_list_decorate([ tempTitre, min_label, minInput, max_label, maxInput, h_label, hInput, p_label, pInput, e_label, eInput, v_label, start_button ]);
        ρσ_Iter10 = ((typeof ρσ_Iter10[Symbol.iterator] === "function") ? (ρσ_Iter10 instanceof Map ? ρσ_Iter10.keys() : ρσ_Iter10) : Object.keys(ρσ_Iter10));
        for (var ρσ_Index10 of ρσ_Iter10) {
            w = ρσ_Index10;
            "542";
            w.remove();
        }
        "544";
        scene.visible = true;
        "547";
        (await creer_ui_secondaire());
    };
    if (!lancer_diagramme.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(lancer_diagramme, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["bouton"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "553";
    async function ajoutObjet(evt) {
        var ρσ_ls, posObjet, t;
        "554";
        "555";
        counter=counter["+"](1);
        "556";
        posObjet = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(scene.mouse, scene.mouse.project, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({normal: vec(0, 0, 1), point: vec(0, 0, 0)})]);
        "558";
        t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, sphere, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: posObjet, radius: .3, color: color.magenta})]);
        "559";
        objetsMagenta.append(t);
        "560";
        t = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: posObjet, axis: norm(vec(objVitesse, 1, 0))["*"](max_x)["*"](1.5), color: color.red, radius: .07})]);
        "561";
        objetsMagenta.append(t);
    };
    if (!ajoutObjet.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(ajoutObjet, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["evt"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "564";
    async function ajoutCheck(ev) {
        "565";
        "566";
        modeAjout = ev.checked;
    };
    if (!ajoutCheck.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(ajoutCheck, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["ev"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "568";
    async function redirection() {
        "569";
        if (!modeAjout) {
            "571";
            (await decomposer_position());
        }
    };
    if (!redirection.__module__) Object.defineProperties(redirection, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "573";
    async function redirection2() {
        "574";
        "575";
        if (modeAjout) {
            "576";
            debutLigne = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(scene.mouse, scene.mouse.project, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({normal: vec(0, 0, 1), point: vec(0, 0, 0)})]);
            "577";
            clicEnCours = true;
            "578";
        } else {
            "579";
            (await decomposer_position());
        }
    };
    if (!redirection2.__module__) Object.defineProperties(redirection2, {
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "583";
    async function relacherSouris(evt) {
        var ρσ_ls, finLigne, distance, ligne, n, t, point, direction, cyl, i;
        "584";
        "585";
        if (modeAjout && clicEnCours && debutLigne !== null) {
            "586";
            finLigne = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(scene.mouse, scene.mouse.project, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({normal: vec(0, 0, 1), point: vec(0, 0, 0)})]);
            "587";
            if (finLigne !== null) {
                "588";
                distance = mag(finLigne["-"](1["*"](debutLigne)));
                "589";
                if (distance["<"](.2)) {
                    "591";
                    (await ajoutObjet(evt));
                    "592";
                } else {
                    "594";
                    ligne = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, curve, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({radius: .05, color: color.magenta})]);
                    "595";
                    objetsMagenta.append(ligne);
                    "597";
                    n = 5;
                    "598";
                    for (var ρσ_Index11 = 0; ρσ_Index11["<"](n["+"](1)); ρσ_Index11++) {
                        i = ρσ_Index11;
                        "599";
                        t = i["/"](n);
                        "600";
                        point = debutLigne["*"](1["-"](1["*"](t)))["+"](finLigne["*"](t));
                        "601";
                        ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(ligne, ligne.append, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: point})]);
                        "602";
                        direction = norm(vec(objVitesse, 1, 0));
                        "603";
                        cyl = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, cylinder, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: point, axis: direction["*"](20), radius: 1, color: color.magenta, opacity: .1})]);
                        "604";
                        objetsMagenta.append(cyl);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        "606";
        debutLigne = null;
        "607";
        clicEnCours = false;
    };
    if (!relacherSouris.__argnames__) Object.defineProperties(relacherSouris, {
        __argnames__ : {value: ["evt"]},
        __module__ : {value: null}
    });

    "612";
    pointeurSouris = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, sphere, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({pos: vec(0, 0, 0), radius: .25, color: color.yellow, shininess: 0, visible: false})]);
    "621";
    scene.bind("mousemove", redirection);
    "622";
    scene.bind("mousedown", redirection2);
    "623";
    scene.bind("mouseup", relacherSouris);
    "627";
    fleche_x = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({color: color.red, shaftwidth: .15})]);
    "628";
    fleche_y = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({color: color.green, shaftwidth: .15})]);
    "630";
    fleche_xobv = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({color: color.red, shaftwidth: .15})]);
    "631";
    fleche_yobv = ρσ_interpolate_kwargs.call(this, arrow, [ρσ_desugar_kwargs({color: color.green, shaftwidth: .15})]);
};
if (!__main__.__module__) Object.defineProperties(__main__, {
    __module__ : {value: null}
});

;$(function(){ window.__context = { glowscript_container: $("#glowscript").removeAttr("id") }; __main__() })})()
// END JAVASCRIPT

//--><!]]></script>
</div>

```
